data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Encrypts data in transit and at rest to protect user information.
data.technical_spec: Uses TLS for data in transit and AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: Account Security
data.description: Offers two-factor authentication to enhance user account security.
data.technical_spec: Supports authentication via mobile apps and text messages.

data.title: Access Controls
data.description: Implements strict role-based access control within its infrastructure.
data.technical_spec: Granular permissions for different service access levels.

data.title: Threat Monitoring
data.description: Continuously monitors for suspicious activities and threats.
data.technical_spec: Employs machine learning algorithms to detect anomalies.

data.title: Bug Bounty Program
data.description: Encourages security researchers to report vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Offers rewards for verified security issues reported by external contributors.
